mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, mechanically increasing present valuations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0 percent, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, boosting corporate earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 5.0 percent within a 3-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and residential housing starts signals broad-based economic recovery, which expands profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative directional accuracy below 55% over a 3-year out-of-sample test, or the interaction term coefficient in a multivariate regression becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, rising real money supply growth directly fuels equity risk premiums, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days only when inflation exceeds 3.0 percent annually.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when CPIAUCSL growth drops below 2.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Continuous quarter-over-quarter expansion in real GDP compresses equity risk premiums by confirming durable economic growth, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical difference from zero during consecutive positive GDP growth quarters.

mechanism_narrative: When nonfarm payrolls exceed 200,000 additions in a single month, the labor market absorbs slack rapidly, triggering earnings revisions upward and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are negative in more than 65% of months where PAYEMS growth surpasses 200,000, or the signal fails to predict returns during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates combined with contracting real money supply growth signal aggressive liquidity withdrawal, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields positive forward returns in more than 50% of instances, or the interaction term fails to improve model fit (AIC reduction < 2) over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: During supply-constrained periods, industrial production growth outpaces demand indicators, leading to margin expansion and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days only when capacity utilization exceeds 80 percent.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the signal produces no statistical edge when INDPRO growth decelerates for two consecutive months.
